schema.description: Summary of a loaded mod, persisted after discovery.

additionalProperties.description: A single declared asset entry from a MOD's package.json.

description.description: Human-readable description (used by LLM agents for asset selection).

path.description: File path relative to the MOD root directory.

additionalProperties.title: AssetDeclaration

commands.description: Available MOD command names (paths are not included).

modDir.description: Absolute path to the mod's root directory on disk.

serviceScriptPath.description: Service script path (long-running process, auto-launched at startup).

oneOf.description: Tray menu item contributed by this mod.

items.description:
A single tray menu entry contributed by a mod.

Has either `command` (leaf — clickable) or `items` (submenu), never both.
items.title: TrayMenuItem

oneOf.title: TrayMenuItem

schema.title: ModInfo
